SEARCH
Package com.mimecast.robin.queue

Class SQLQueueDatabase<T extends Serializable>

java.lang.Object
com.mimecast.robin.queue.SQLQueueDatabase<T>
Type Parameters:
T - payload type
All Implemented Interfaces:
QueueDatabase<T>, Closeable, AutoCloseable
Direct Known Subclasses:
QueueMariaDB, QueuePgSQL
public abstract class SQLQueueDatabase<T extends Serializable> extends Object implements QueueDatabase<T>
SQL-backed scheduled work queue.

    • initialize

      public void initialize()
      Description copied from interface: QueueDatabase
      Initialize external resources.
      Specified by:
      initialize in interface QueueDatabase<T extends Serializable>

    • isQueueSchemaCompatible

      private boolean isQueueSchemaCompatible(Connection connection)
      Validates that the configured table matches Robin's expected schema.

      The queue schema has evolved over time. If an older schema is present, queries that reference modern columns (for example, state) will fail at runtime.

      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection.
      Returns:
      True if the schema looks compatible; otherwise, false.

    • recreateQueueTable

      private void recreateQueueTable(Connection connection) throws SQLException
      Recreates the queue table when an incompatible legacy schema is detected.

      The existing table is renamed to a legacy name to preserve data for inspection. The new table is then created using the current schema and indexes.

      Parameters:
      connection - Database connection.
      Throws:
      SQLException - If migration cannot be completed.

    • getRenameTableSQL

      private String getRenameTableSQL(String legacyTableName)
